stories.title: Canada GP Sprint Weekend — Everything You Need to Watch (May 22-24)
stories.angle: Canada has everything — title rivalry, sprint format, the Wall of Champions, and one of F1's most passionate crowds. This is the must-watch weekend of the season so far.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
CANADA GP WEEKEND IS HERE. 🇨🇦

Fri May 22: Sprint Qualifying 9:30 PM ET
Sat May 23: Sprint Race 5 PM | Qualifying 9 PM
Sun May 24: Race ~2 PM ET

Antonelli going for 4 straight. Russell won here last year. BUCKLE UP. #F1 #CanadianGP

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Canada GP storylines:

✅ Antonelli 4-for-4 bid (never done before)
✅ Russell won here from pole in 2025
✅ Leclerc needs a bounce-back after Miami meltdown
✅ Verstappen vs. the Wall of Champions

This is the most important weekend of the season. #F1 #CanadianGP

article.headline: Canada GP 2026: Your Complete Sprint Weekend Guide for Circuit Gilles Villeneuve

stories.title: Russell vs. Antonelli — Inside the Mercedes Teammate Title Battle
stories.angle: Never before has a defending race winner faced his own teammate as championship leader in Canada — the tension within the Mercedes garage is as compelling as any inter-team battle on the grid.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Antonelli leads Russell by 20 points. They're TEAMMATES.

Russell won from pole in Montreal in 2025. He arrives NEEDING this weekend.

The most compelling title battle in F1 might be inside the Mercedes garage. #F1 #CanadianGP

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
George Russell at Circuit Gilles Villeneuve:

2025: Pole + Win.
2026: Down 20 points in the championship to his teammate.

No. 1 priority this weekend. Everything is on the table. #F1 #CanadianGP

article.headline: Russell vs. Antonelli: Inside Formula 1's Most Unlikely — and Most Compelling — Teammate Title Battle

stories.title: Leclerc's Miami Meltdown — 20-Second Penalty, Crash, Ferrari Crisis
stories.angle: How did one of the grid's most experienced drivers have such a complete final-lap collapse? And how do Ferrari recover heading into Canada?

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Charles Leclerc on his Miami final lap disaster:

"It was all on me."

Spun into the wall at Turn 3. 20-second post-race penalty. Dropped from podium to P8.

Ferrari heads to Canada needing a reset. #F1 #CanadianGP

article.headline: Leclerc's Miami Disaster: A Final-Lap Crash, a 20-Second Penalty, and a Ferrari Crisis

stories.title: Antonelli's Historic Records — F1's Youngest Championship Leader
stories.angle: Context and awe — at 19, Antonelli is rewriting the record books. What's the ceiling for this season?

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Kimi Antonelli — age 19 — is the youngest driver in F1 history to lead the World Championship.

3 wins. 3 poles. 3-from-3 pole-to-wins (first EVER in F1 history).

He's rewriting the record books in Year 1. #F1 #Antonelli

article.headline: Antonelli at 19: The Record Books Say This Has Never Happened Before

stories.title: Red Bull's RB22 Crisis — Worst Season Start in a Decade
stories.angle: How did the team that dominated the sport in 2022-24 fall so far so fast — and can they find a fix before Verstappen's exit clause activates at the Hungarian GP?

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Max Verstappen on the RB22:

"Incredibly tough to drive. Every lap is a fight."

Red Bull admitted "significant shortcomings." Max is P7 — 74 points behind the leader.

The team that dominated 2022-24 is now in crisis. #F1 #RedBull

article.headline: From Dominant to Desperate: How Red Bull's RB22 Became Verstappen's Biggest Problem
